title: Global (Senior) Salesforce Business Analyst & Admin (Marketing & Data Cloud - m/f/d)
required_skills: Salesforce Marketing Cloud Admin/Consultant Certification or BA Certification
Business requirements translation into scalable marketing solutions
matched_skills: Multilingual (German B1+, Chinese C2, Japanese B1)
missing_skills: Marketing automation platform (journeys, segmentation, campaign orchestration)
core_responsibilities: Own and evolve Marketing & Data Cloud streams within global CRM ecosystem
Design and implement global marketing automation, campaign orchestration, segmentation solutions
Translate business requirements into solution designs and technical specifications
Validate requirements for scalable globally aligned marketing automation
Collaborate across globally distributed platform team with POs, BAs, CRM specialists
recommended_emphasis: Highlight JIRA and Confluence usage in project coordination roles
Emphasize customer data analysis at Hapag-Lloyd to partially bridge CRM gap
Stress multilingual capability (German, Chinese, Japanese) for global distributed team
Surface KPI dashboard and Power BI PL-300 for data/reporting responsibilities
Frame stakeholder management at HSBC to match platform team collaboration model
